projects.title: Car-pooling System
projects.description: Developed a Java-based carpooling platform to connect drivers and passengers dynamically. Implemented ride-matching algorithms using DSA concepts for efficient search and allocation. Used JDBC for database operations (CRUD) and optimized SQL queries for performance.

projects.title: Customer Relationship Management (CRM) System
projects.description: Built a CRM application to manage customer data, track interactions, and automate sales pipeline. Designed REST APIs using Spring Boot and integrated MySQL database for persistent storage. Implemented authentication and role-based access control.

projects.title: LeetCode Coding Helper Extension
projects.description: Developed a Chrome extension that enhances LeetCode problem-solving using AI-powered assistance through Google Gemini API. Implemented features for problem explanation, approach guidance, and code review. Designed a dark-themed, responsive UI using modern web standards (Manifest V3).

internships.description: Selected to develop scalable cloud-based features using Java, OOP, and Agile methodologies Will work with CI pipelines, relational databases, and AI-integrated workflows

certifications: Btech in Information Technology Sri Krishna College of Engineering and Technology 09/2023 - 05/2027 Coimbatore, India
Solved 1100+ problems in LeetCode (focused on DSA & problem-solving).
